backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profile management and email subscription features with role-based access control (admin/user permissions) using AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two logo replacement features: saving the HOPE and CETA Galaxy logos as static assets and updating their references in Navigation.tsx, HeroSection.tsx, and Footer.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend component file paths to short descriptions summarizing the purpose and key content of each component in the CGCT HOPE Vision 2036 site.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'CETA Galaxy Charitable Trust (CGCT) HOPE Vision 2036' and mounting the app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app in LanguageProvider and renders all page sections sequentially: Navigation, Hero, About, VisionPillars, Reunion, Survey, StakeholderVoices, DigitalImpact, and Footer.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component rendering an animated timeline (2010–2026), descriptive paragraphs, and a chairman profile card with a quote, using intersection observer for scroll animations.
frontend/src/components/DigitalImpactSec: Section displaying four digital transformation initiatives (Newsletter, Brand Ambassadors, School Liaison Network, WhatsApp/Email Strategy) as animated icon cards in a responsive grid.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Full-width footer with a CTA banner, action buttons, dual organization logos, contact info, social media links, a newsletter subscription form wired to the backend, and a copyright bar.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with animated countdown timer, count-up stat cards (years, alumni, batches, stars), logo row, headline, and a scroll-to-survey CTA button, all styled with a maroon gradient background and gold accents.
frontend/src/components/LeafMotif.tsx: Decorative background component that renders up to 5 absolutely-positioned rotated diamond/leaf shapes with configurable count, opacity, and color.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware styling, smooth-scroll nav links, a language toggle button (EN/ML), and dual logos (CETA Galaxy and HOPE), including a responsive mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/ReunionSection.t: Section detailing the first HOPE Alumni Reunion event (April 12, 2026, KILA Thrissur), displaying a reunion poster, event details card, purpose icons grid, and participant category cards with intersection-observer-driven animations.
frontend/src/components/StakeholderVoice: Section showcasing six stakeholder insight cards from February 2026 meetings, each with an icon, title, and description, plus meeting badge pills at the bottom, animated on scroll via intersection observer.
frontend/src/components/SurveySection.ts: Survey call-to-action section with links to English and Malayalam Microsoft Forms surveys, a confidentiality badge, and a branded CGCT HOPE Vision 2036 poster card, animated on scroll.
frontend/src/components/VisionPillarsSec: React component that renders a 4-pillar strategic framework section for Vision 2036, with animated cards using intersection observer, each pillar having an icon, title, and checklist items with distinct brand colors.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Provides a React context for bilingual (English/Malayalam) support, exposing a translation function `t()` and a language toggle, with all UI string translations defined inline.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCountdown.ts: Custom hook that counts down to a fixed target date (12 April 2026, 9:00 AM IST), updating every second and returning days, hours, minutes, seconds, and an expiry flag.
frontend/src/hooks/useCountUp.ts: Custom hook that animates a number from 0 to a target value over a given duration using requestAnimationFrame with an ease-out cubic curve.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing a React context provider and hook with login/logout functionality and status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useIntersectionObserv: Custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver to set a boolean `isVisible` flag once a referenced element enters the viewport, then disconnects the observer.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a `useSubmitSubscription` mutation hook that calls the backend actor's `submitSubscription` method with an email address.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining the CGCT design system with CSS custom properties for brand colors (maroon, gold, sage), Tailwind base/utilities, typography, and reusable animation and component utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom brand colors (maroon, gold, sage, cream), typography/font families, animations, shadows, and plugin setup for a charitable trust website.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for 'CGCT HOPE Vision 2036' tracking version 3, which replaces CETA Galaxy Charitable Trust and HOPE logos in Navigation, HeroSection, and Footer components with newly provided logo assets.
